reviews.review_description: This game is a great hangout type unity made game. It has a great moderation team and community! You should definitely give this game a try.

I first played the game and went into shop there were only 4-5 cosmetics or so. And some gamemodes can be broken depending on the teleport script. The textures are kinda bad and overall the lighting is horrible. The mirror is the best part of the game to be honest.

As someone who got to beta test and be a mod this game is really fun and I recommend you play this with friends to make it extra more fun because this game is gonna even better in the near future. 

Slushie

reviews.review_title: This game is so good bro
reviews.review_description: This game has speeding wall, hangout, space, COOKIE CLICKER, AND CHASE (where you get chased down) has cosmetics and a chill room. This is a good cube runners fan game
This game is so cool. It has cool maps and cosmetics and so much more. Please download this game 9999999999/10
Stop messing with my review this game is bad textures nothing to do by yourself 2 gamemodes and one doesnt work
Bro this game is so fire every one should play it
